name: Matrix Recommendation
description: Propose a new recommendation for the org health matrix
labels: ["recommendation", "content"]

## Which matrix cell?

Specify the matrix cell this recommendation applies to (e.g., "High Growth / Low Engagement").

## Recommendation Title

A short, descriptive title for the recommendation.

## Description

Explain the recommendation in detail. What should the user see or do?

## Triggering Signals

What signals or data conditions should cause this recommendation to appear? Describe the detection logic.

## Tags

List relevant tags (e.g., `adoption`, `engagement`, `governance`, `license-risk`).

## References

Link to relevant Salesforce documentation or resources:

- https://developer.salesforce.com/docs/...
